PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Robert Von Merta.

The Court noted that Linda Von Merta was not present and that she had not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Rasch stated that there are no assets in the Estate, that her Client filed for probate because he is pursuing a class action law suit against an annuity and that the house had been signed over to her Client in 1990 when the Father was still alive. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Robert Von Merta with full authority (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.
